name: Raisin Spice Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour enough boiling water over raisins to cover them. Cover and let stand 10 minutes.
2. Beat shortening and sugar together until creamy.
3. Add eggs; beat until fluffy.
4. Drain raisins, reserving 1/2 cup liquid. Dissolve soda in this liquid.
5. Sift together flour, salt, and spices.
6. Add to creamed mixture alternately with raisin liquid; blend well.
7. Stir in raisins and oats.
8. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto greased cookie sheets.
9. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) 12 to 15 minutes.
